title: Myrsiphyllum multituberosum
taxonomy: Myrsiphyllum multituberosum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This family includes over 57 genera and more than 3,000 species of plants, commonly known as pineapples and air plants. Myrsiphyllum multituberosum is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within the Bromeliaceae family. Further research is needed to provide more specific information about its classification within the family.
